name: SecurityLocalGenerateSHA512
title: SecurityLocalGenerateSHA512
syntax: long SecurityLocalGenerateSHA512(byte data[], dword dataLength, byte sha512[], dword sha512Length)
description: Generates a SHA512 hash for the given data and key. The generated hash is a SipHash.
return: A Value of 1 means that the action was successful. A value less than or equal to 0 means error.
